레위기 18:2.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, and say to them, ‘I am Yahweh your God.

레위기 18:3.content: You shall not do as they do in the land of Egypt, where you lived. You shall not do as they do in the land of Canaan, where I am bringing you. You shall not follow their statutes.

레위기 18:4.content: You shall do my ordinances. You shall keep my statutes and walk in them. I am Yahweh your God.

레위기 18:5.content: You shall therefore keep my statutes and my ordinances, which if a man does, he shall live in them. I am Yahweh.

레위기 18:6.content: “ ‘None of you shall approach any close relatives, to uncover their nakedness: I am Yahweh.

레위기 18:7.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father, nor the nakedness of your mother: she is your mother. You shall not uncover her nakedness.

레위기 18:8.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s wife. It is your father’s nakedness.

레위기 18:9.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your sister, the daughter of your father, or the daughter of your mother, whether born at home or born abroad.

레위기 18:10.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your son’s daughter, or of your daughter’s daughter, even their nakedness; for theirs is your own nakedness.

레위기 18:11.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s wife’s daughter, conceived by your father, since she is your sister.

레위기 18:12.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s sister. She is your father’s near kinswoman.

레위기 18:13.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your mother’s sister, for she is your mother’s near kinswoman.

레위기 18:14.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father’s brother. You shall not approach his wife. She is your aunt.

레위기 18:15.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your daughter-in-law. She is your son’s wife. You shall not uncover her nakedness.

레위기 18:16.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of your brother’s wife. It is your brother’s nakedness.

레위기 18:17.content: “ ‘You shall not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter. You shall not take her son’s daughter, or her daughter’s daughter, to uncover her nakedness. They are near kinswomen. It is wickedness.

레위기 18:18.content: “ ‘You shall not take a wife in addition to her sister, to be a rival, to uncover her nakedness, while her sister is still alive.

레위기 18:19.content: “ ‘You shall not approach a woman to uncover her nakedness, as long as she is impure by her uncleanness.

레위기 18:20.content: “ ‘You shall not lie carnally with your neighbor’s wife, and defile yourself with her.

레위기 18:21.content: “ ‘You shall not give any of your children as a sacrifice to Molech. You shall not profane the name of your God. I am Yahweh.

레위기 18:22.content: “ ‘You shall not lie with a man as with a woman. That is detestable.

레위기 18:23.content: “ ‘You shall not lie with any animal to defile yourself with it. No woman may give herself to an animal, to lie down with it: it is a perversion.

레위기 18:24.content: “ ‘Don’t defile yourselves in any of these things; for in all these the nations which I am casting out before you were defiled.

레위기 18:25.content: The land was defiled. Therefore I punished its iniquity, and the land vomited out her inhabitants.

레위기 18:26.content: You therefore shall keep my statutes and my ordinances, and shall not do any of these abominations; neither the native-born, nor the stranger who lives as a foreigner among you

레위기 18:27.content: (for the men of the land that were before you had done all these abominations, and the land became defiled),

레위기 18:28.content: that the land not vomit you out also, when you defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.

레위기 18:29.content: “ ‘For whoever shall do any of these abominations, even the souls that do them shall be cut off from among their people.

레위기 18:30.content: Therefore you shall keep my requirements, that you do not practice any of these abominable customs which were practiced before you, and that you do not defile yourselves with them. I am Yahweh your God.’ ”
